title: Praise Waits for You In Zion

verses.text: How blest the man you’ve chosen To bring within your courts. We’re filled with all the goodness Of your most holy house. By awesome deeds you answer With righteoussness, O God Our Savior, hope of nations And farthest seas abroad.

By strength you formed the mountains. You hushed the sea’s loud voice; You calmed the waves’ great roaring And stilled the people’s notes. Those living in remote lands Will fear your wondrous ways. You make the morn and evening Shout with songs of praise.
